name: Waterford
description: Our signature woven duvet collection. Yarn-dyed long-staple cotton with a soft matelassé texture and a quiet tonal border — offered across a full range of colors and bed sizes.

name: Cloudloft Bath Rug
description: A dense, quick-drying pile that cushions every step out of the shower. Memory-soft and slip-resistant.

name: Pillowed Memory Bath Mat
description: Layered memory foam core wrapped in plush microfiber for a spa-underfoot feeling.

name: Heirloom Turkish Bath Towel
description: Long-staple Turkish cotton that grows softer and more absorbent with every wash.

name: Ribbed Spa Hand Towel
description: Textured rib weave with a tailored border. Sold as a set of two.

name: Marble Tumbler
description: Honed resin tumbler with a soft marbled finish to anchor your vanity.

name: Toothbrush Holder
description: Weighted base with four slots, finished to coordinate with the marble collection.

name: Lotion Dispenser
description: Pump dispenser with a brushed metal collar and refillable resin body.

name: Hand-Knotted Accent Rug
description: A small-scale hand-knotted wool rug with a low, even pile and fringed ends.

name: Loomweave Area Rug 5x8
description: Flatwoven from recycled cotton in a quiet tonal stripe. Reversible and durable.

name: Heritage Down Comforter
description: Baffle-box construction filled with responsibly sourced down for even, lofty warmth.

name: Washed Percale Sheet Set
description: Crisp, breathable percale given a garment wash for that perfectly lived-in hand.

name: Linen Duvet Cover
description: Pre-washed European flax linen with a relaxed drape and hidden button closure.

name: Boucle Lumbar Pillow
description: A nubby boucle face with a linen back and feather-down insert included.

name: Handloom Throw Blanket
description: Reversible handloom throw with brushed cotton softness and tasseled ends.
